After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. snippet.title: GTA MZANSI  - WHERE IS MADANONE? - SEASON 5 TRAILER
snippet.description:
This film is made to inspire the youth of South Africa to make the right decisions. The goal is to show that crime does not pay! Work hard in school and be the best you can be! If you don't want to have a 9-5 job one day and you see school as a useless place to be, here's some advice, study hard and get a degree then open your own business one day. By doing that, you're able to make a lot of money, you don't have a 9-5 job and you are qualified in what you do. So many birds tackled with one stone! Study hard and reap the rewards later!

Music by: @vmcopyrightfreemusic
Track: Ironfall Warpath
Link to Video: https://youtu.be/x6WfaHnezxk?si=vWAAa_pmkhmZPEMj

This is the official SEASON 5 GTA Mzansi TRAILER. Our beloved country South Africa has been through a lot throughout the years that have passed but one thing every South African will tell you is, there is no place like home❤️

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale.
